name: hud_ui_text_label_rebuild_text_bounds
description: HudUiTextLabel::RebuildTextBounds measures the current text and updates clipRect right/bottom from clipRect left/top.
known_limits: Depends on zImage_Font::MeasureString, which is functionally accepted but remains binary-safe debt.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?RebuildTextBounds@HudUiTextLabel@@QAEXXZ at 0x4bcd80 still fails: 60 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 11 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 59 bytes and the VC object symbol is 80 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows local width/line-advance outputs passed to zImage_Font::MeasureString, then clipRect right = left + width and bottom = top + lineAdvance.
The native text-label smoke validates clipRect updates through centered text extent rebuilding.
